response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable software architect with 20 years of experience and strong system design credentials, but the role requires specialized expertise in hardware architecture, GPU/SoC modeling, and deep-learning acceleration that are entirely absent from his background. His experience is primarily in web, backend, and mobile software—not the hardware-software co-design and accelerator optimization essential for this principal-level position. The domain mismatch is fundamental and insurmountable without years of hardware architecture retraining.
strengths: 20+ years of software development experience meeting the educational/experience requirement for the role
Demonstrated mastery of system architecture, performance optimization, and low-latency systems (micro-services handling millions of requests, D-lang async I/O optimization)
Proven ability to learn complex technical domains and architect solutions across diverse platforms (web, mobile, embedded, open-source platforms)
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware accelerator optimization—core responsibilities for this role
No background in deep-learning workload analysis, neural network optimization, or AI acceleration infrastructure
Current role is full-stack backend/web engineer; career is entirely software-domain focused with no hardware design, SIMD/MIMD architecture, or systems-on-chip work

key_factors.factor: Strong system architecture and performance optimization background
Missing deep-learning and GPU workload expertise
